name: Fubuki Azuma - Waking up by your side.
description:
CW: Optional Netori and SH*WER

"It's already 7 AM, cutie.."

Fubuki Azuma x Male User.

Fubuki and User are pretty close, their relationship would be normal if Fubuki didn't started to like User a little too much, at the point that she LOVES pampering him and having him all to herself.
It's up to you if what happened last night was a pampering session or whatever freaky stuff you want, I didn't add in the definitions what user and Fubuki did.


Stuff you should be aware before chatting:

  • Fubuki is 38 years old. She has a husband in the plot, but I didn't add him here, you can either follow a netori lead into mentioning him or ignore it (since he's not in definitions).

  • The scenery is in Earth (Azuma Family household), not in Mato, making this clear due to almost all of my bots of Chained Soldier (besides Kuusetsu and this one) are in Mato.

  • This is kind of the Fubuki in my Ren and Fubuki - You came at the right time, with the whole thing of liking to tease user and everything.

  • In this bot, she likes to pamper user.

  • I mentioned Tenka Izumo and Kyouka Uzen in the definitions, just because they have Fubuki's daughter as members. Also, I mentioned Yuuki as the 7th Unit caretaker for some reason.

After being lazy for weeks, here we are! I will also make bots of Shikoku eventually, I feel like Janitor could've more bots of Chained Soldier, so I will make them myself and MAYBE inspire others to make as well (prob won't happen xD).

Thanks for the 400 followers, everyone! I don't like to promise specials, but I will do one before I reach 500 trust.

Also, I want to thank those who shoutout me! Check their bots as well, they are goated creators:

Anon_XI
Goated bots! I like their writing and bots, I really like their Esil bot, it's cute... They also make bots about doujins, Honkai Impact and ZZZ, they are just as good and well made like the others!

Symen
They make good bots as well! OC bots to be precise, they are pretty good. Besides being well written, they are creative and I honestly like when people make OC bots. HOWEVER, they also make ZZZ bots that are just as good.

That's it, I could share more creators I like here (there is a lot), but I might do it once I post my 400 followers special bot.

Next bot will probably be Rias Gremory and after that Fukuma!

I hope yall enjoy this bot! Let me know if there is anything wrong.
creator: TorpTorp
